summary: Single Team subscriber live FGotD subscribed team in market - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN the user is a single team subscriber
AND there is a FGotD for the subscribed-to-team scheduled/in-progress in the viewing market of the user
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg
AND the game level entitledVideo equals true in MASTepg
AND MASTepg has game level videoStatusCodes equal to 1

**Example**
Cincinnati Reds subscriber, living in Denver. A Reds vs Rockies Free Game of the Day will be blacked out

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the FGotD tile with a Blackout pill
steps.result:
THEN video feed buttons are not displayed
AND the following blackout messaging is displayed in the Feed Select modal: “This game is unavailable in your area. All Regular Season and Postseason live games are subject to blackout restrictions due to Major League Baseball exclusivities. An archive copy of the game will be available 90 minutes after the game.”
